title: SSbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Gold is priced at $4,700 an ounce. Here's how to invest for under $100 now.

items.title: Nearly 208,000 heated socks sold at Costco recalled due to burn injuries
